description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown corrugated metal panels. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. A covered porch extends across the front, supported by simple posts, and features a small set of steps leading up to the entrance. The cabin has a secondary, smaller roofed section on one side, likely serving as an additional sheltered area or side entrance. Windows are minimal and small, with one visible on the front facade and another on the side, both rectangular and unadorned. The overall structure is elevated slightly above ground level on short stilts, typical of cabins designed for rural or semi-urban environments.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable metal roof, front porch, and minimal windows, elevated on short stilts. The exterior features weathered wood planks and a secondary roofed side section.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main gable roof, the secondary roofed section on the left, and the open porch area with supporting posts.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, central entrance, and a small window above the porch roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long wooden wall, the secondary roofed area, and the steps leading to the side entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wooden wall with no visible windows or doors, and the gable end of the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal panels and a secondary shed-style overhang on one side
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small rectangular windows, one above the porch on the front facade and one on the side, arranged asymmetrically and spaced apart
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, accessible from the porch; possible secondary entrance on the side under the smaller roofed section
